title: Norwegian Lamb Kebabs
description: A simple and flavorful dish that combines the smoky taste of lamb with a hint of norwegian spices. Perfect for a quick and energizing meal.

ingredients.name: Smoky Paprika
ingredients.notes: Use a high-quality smoky paprika for the best flavor

ingredients.name: Norwegian Salt
ingredients.notes: Use a flaky norwegian salt for added depth

ingredients.name: Grill Skewers
ingredients.notes: Soak in water for 30 minutes before grilling

instructions: Thread lamb cubes, rosemary sprigs, and a pinch of norwegian salt onto grill skewers.
Brush the kebabs with olive oil and sprinkle with smoky paprika.
Grill the kebabs for 8-10 minutes per side, or until cooked to your desired level of doneness.
Let the kebabs rest for 5 minutes before serving.
